{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Sandviper body
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sandviper sect]] calls the [[Bloodforged Iron body]] the '[[Sandviper body]]'.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Sandviper body]] is received during an advancement ceremony.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
